display_information.name: Done That
display_information.description: Making your work visible, on your terms
display_information.long_description:
Capture and share your work progress automatically, while maintaining complete control of what gets shared.

We keep track of your work so you don't have to. Just one minute of review at the end of your day to celebrate your achievements.

We built Done That with privacy as our top priority. You maintain complete control over your data.
